description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular radio receiver with a flat, metallic blade-like body and a slightly curved, ergonomic handle. The handle appears to be made of a dark, matte material, possibly plastic or rubber, and is attached to the main body with visible rivets or screws. The main body is broad and flat, with a smooth, metallic finish, and lacks any visible dials, buttons, or speaker grilles. There are no visible antennas, display screens, or branding elements on the surface. The overall design is minimalistic and utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of handling. The object is small and lightweight, suitable for handheld use.
description: A compact, metallic radio receiver with a flat body and a curved, dark handle, featuring a minimalistic and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile and the handle's attachment to the main body.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the full flat blade-like body and the curved handle with visible rivets.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizing the handle's length and the uniform width of the main body.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat body and handle curvature.
